عصام كمال - ويعني لو (حصرياً) | 2026

إنتاج / عصام كمال 

كلمات الأغنية

ويعني لو يخونوني أوادم مرت بدنياي 
قبل صارت وشي عادي ولا أثر ترئ فيني 
ولكن القهر والموت خيانة من كبر وياي 
معي عاش العمر كله ولا فارق أبد عيني 

أمنته على أسراري وتقاسمنا الهوى والماي 
حفظته في وسط صدري ولا توقعت يأذيني
همومه كانت همومي وبلاوي دنيته بلواي 
وبالآخر وش اللي صار نكر عشرتنا وسنيني 

غريبه طاوعه قلبه على جرحي يعزف الناي
وأنا اللي كنت أحسب انه من جروحي بيداويني
خساره عمري اللي راح ولكن العوض بـ الجاي
أنا مؤمن ورب الكون أكيد انه بينسيني

snippet.title: Sierra | New Hero Gameplay Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Reach heroic new heights with our newest Damage Hero, Sierra! 

Watchpoint: Grand Mesa’s Head of Security is ready to take the fight directly to Talon. With her Helix Rifle in one hand and her Anchor Drone, Dorothy, in the other, Sierra brings a fresh new set of skills to each team fight and is always ready to take point no matter the obstacle.

See what Sierra’s truly capable of when Season 2: Summit starts April 14.

Overwatch is free to play for everyone on console & PC!

snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present

snippet.title: 30 Seconds of Innocence 🦋
snippet.description:
He gave her pancakes... She gave him everything 🥞🦋
A 30 Second story inspired by a real Clash Royale match.

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale
